name: The Legendary Life of Queen Lau
overview: A streetwise outsider disrupts the royal court when she marries a cold king, determined to reform the palace and win her husband's heart against all odds.

trailers.title: MULTISUB 杀青特辑：揭秘想象之外的后宫真面目！ |【我叫刘金凤 The Legendary Life of Queen Lau】辣目洋子/李宏毅/陈欣予 | 古装爱情片 | 优酷 YOUKU
